---
name: Content Pack Contribution
about: Add or improve questions, labs, or guides in oss-content-packs/
title: "[Content] "
labels: content, good first issue
assignees: ''
---

**What content are you contributing or requesting?**
- [ ] Quiz questions (which topic or cert track?)
- [ ] Lab exercise
- [ ] Getting started guide
- [ ] MCP server or AI tooling guide
- [ ] Other

**Topic or certification target**
e.g., Terraform Associate 004, AWS SAA-C03, Azure AZ-900, GCP ACE

**Exam domain alignment** (if applicable)
Which official exam objective does this content address?

**Content status**
- [ ] I am submitting a PR with this content now
- [ ] I am requesting this content from the community
- [ ] I want to start a discussion before writing it

**Notes**
Any context about accuracy, source material, or known gaps.
